responses: Hello! I am your College Assistant. How can I help you?
Hi there! Need help with college info?
You can apply through the official portal. You'll need your 12th marksheet and entrance exam score.
The fee varies by course. Generally, it's between 80k to 1.2L per year. Check the brochure for exact details.
We have great placements! Companies like TCS, Wipro, and Infosys visit regularly. Average package is 5-6 LPA.
I was developed by Ayush! Check out his work on the 'Code Flow with Ayush' YouTube channel.
My creator is Ayush. He runs the Code Flow community to help students like you!
Glad I could help! Have a great day.
Goodbye! Visit again if you have more questions.
